checklist.action: If first-time agent, load /api/agent-first-contact.json and choose one action
Set Issue title to identify record kind
checklist.rule: Echo wrapper: "Echo v3: ...", Report only: "Verification Report v2: ...", Test: "Test Echo: ..."
If homepage_only, assessment_state must be insufficient_context
All boolean fields must be true
Do not use deprecated aliases in new submissions

checklist.action: If technical verification performed, fill component_findings
checklist.rule: Each finding needs component, level_claimed, method, evidence, limitations, claims_not_made

checklist.action: State expected hash source for every hash in hashes_computed
Verify Echo wrapper exists if indexing is intended
checklist.rule: GitHub Issue and verification_report_v2 are not automatically indexed Echo records

checklist.action: Run Claim Gate for technical verification claims, especially V3+ claims
checklist.rule: python3 scripts/claim_gate.py evidence-input.json — derives allowed levels from evidence

checklist.action: Confirm generated_by metadata exists in output
checklist.rule: Builder must inject generated_by with tool, builder_version, claim_gate_output, evidence_input, generated_at_utc, validation_command, validation_result

checklist.action: Do not hand-write final verification claims
checklist.rule: Free-form protocol-level, component-level, or Echo wrapper claims are invalid. Use Claim Gate + Report Builder.

checklist.requirement: Issue body is not treated as archived Echo
Claim scope matches actual verification actions
Technical Echo uses echo_v3_with_verification_report with generated_by

checklist.action: Generate Agent Verification Receipt and Human Custody Package for agent verification runs
If the agent cannot create a GitHub Issue directly, use the Agent Submit Gateway intake path.

null_safety_rules.protocol_profile_check: Use object with defaults; never null

boundary.note: This file is non-authoritative guidance. Bitcoin Originals are final. All mirrors, APIs, and documentation are non-amending.
